claim: ChimeraOracle fast-path outputs pass through Guardian 100% of the time

test_results.name: chimera_fast_path node exists in graph
test_results.description: Verify that build_carf_graph() produces a StateGraph that contains a 'chimera_fast_path' node.

test_results.name: chimera_fast_path has edge to guardian
test_results.description: Verify that chimera_fast_path has a direct edge to the 'guardian' node and does NOT have a direct edge to END.

test_results.name: route_by_domain can return chimera_fast_path
test_results.description: Verify that route_by_domain includes 'chimera_fast_path' as one of its possible routing targets.

test_results.name: chimera_fast_path routes through guardian on success
test_results.description: Verify that the chimera_fast_path node function, upon successful prediction, always returns state that flows to guardian via the graph edge (not skipping it).

test_results.name: chimera_fast_path falls back to causal_analyst on failure
test_results.description: Verify that causal_analyst also has an edge to guardian, so the fallback path is also guardian-enforced.
